jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Neuland Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Neuland Laboratories in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Neuland Laboratories:
Neuland Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Neuland Laboratories!
